name: Marble Cutters
description: Professional marble and tile cutting machines for construction and renovation projects. Wet and dry cutting for porcelain, granite, and ceramic tiles.

machines.name: Makita 4100NH3ZX1 Handheld Tile/Marble Cutter
machines.shortDescription: Makita 4100NH3ZX1 125mm handheld marble and tile cutter with dust extraction port. Corded electric precision saw for straight cuts in marble, granite, and porcelain.
machines.description: Makita 4100NH3ZX1 125mm handheld marble and tile cutter with dust extraction port. Corded electric precision saw for straight cuts in marble, granite, and porcelain. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: Water feed with flow control valve keeps the blade cool and eliminates silica dust at source
125 mm diamond blade cuts 40 mm marble and granite slabs in a single pass
35 mm extraction port connects to any M-class vacuum for dry cutting compliance
3.2 kg with slim body grip — makes precision cuts one-handed for bathroom and kitchen tiling
12,000 RPM with Makita labyrinth bearing protection against slurry and water ingress
230V corded with 2.5 m cable — no battery fade during continuous marble cutting shifts

machines.name: Bosch GDC 140 Professional Diamond Tile Cutter
machines.shortDescription: Bosch GDC 140 Professional 140mm diamond tile cutter with 90° mitre capability. For precision straight and angled cuts in porcelain, ceramic, and natural stone tiles.
machines.description: Bosch GDC 140 Professional 140mm diamond tile cutter with 90° mitre capability. For precision straight and angled cuts in porcelain, ceramic, and natural stone tiles. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: 140 mm diamond blade with 48 mm depth — cuts through 20 mm porcelain and its substrate in one pass
Adjustable 0-45° mitre fence with roller guide for precise bevel cuts on countertop edges
Parallel guide rail locks straight-line cuts without marking or clamping for repetitive tile work
1.5 kW motor maintains blade speed under load through dense porcelain and granite
35 mm dust port with rubber seal for zero-leakage vacuum connection during dry cutting
3.5 kg with Bosch SDS blade change system — swap a worn blade in under 30 seconds

machines.name: DeWalt DWC860W Heavy Duty Wet Tile Cutter
machines.shortDescription: DeWalt DWC860W 115mm heavy-duty wet tile cutter with constant water feed. Designed for continuous wet cutting of thick marble, granite, and engineered stone slabs.
machines.description: DeWalt DWC860W 115mm heavy-duty wet tile cutter with constant water feed. Designed for continuous wet cutting of thick marble, granite, and engineered stone slabs. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Water Feed: Pressurised hose connection with on-tool valve
specifications.Seal System: Double-lip shaft seal for wet operation

features: Integrated GFCI cuts power instantly if water penetrates the electrical system
Pressurised hose connection feeds water directly to both sides of the blade — no dry spots
Double-lip shaft seal with secondary drain prevents water from reaching the armature bearings
1.3 kW at 13,000 RPM cuts granite countertops at 1 m/min feed rate
3.0 kg with rubber over-mould grip — the lightest wet tile saw in its class for vertical wall cutting
DeWalt 3-year warranty with authorised service centres across Dubai

machines.name: Stanley STSP125 Powerful Marble Cutter
machines.shortDescription: Stanley STSP125 125mm powerful marble and tile cutter. Value-engineered wet/dry saw for construction tiling, stone masonry, and renovation marble cutting work.
machines.description: Stanley STSP125 125mm powerful marble and tile cutter. Value-engineered wet/dry saw for construction tiling, stone masonry, and renovation marble cutting work. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Water System: Gravity-fed water attachment with 2 L bottle
specifications.Cutting Guide: Adjustable rip fence with locking knob
specifications.Blade Included: Diamond turbo rim for marble and granite

features: Gravity-fed 2 L water bottle attachment — no pressurised water connection required on remote sites
Diamond turbo rim blade included — cuts marble, granite, and porcelain out of the box
1.2 kW motor with soft-start limits inrush current to avoid tripping site breakers
Adjustable rip fence with locking knob for repetitive straight cuts without marking each tile
3.3 kg with D-handle and side-assist grip — comfortable two-handed control on vertical surfaces
Stanley worldwide service network with blades and spare parts available off the shelf in the UAE
